attachments.fallback: How can Enterprises Convert multiple OST files to PST in bulk? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text:
Enterprises often deal with hundreds or even thousands of OST files, making manual conversion impractical. A reliable approach is to use a professional solution like the <https://www.cigatisolutions.com/ost-to-pst-converter/|Cigati OST to PST Converter>, which is designed to handle bulk conversions efficiently while maintaining data integrity.

For enterprise-level bulk conversion, the process typically begins by installing the tool on a secure system …
